lines.issue: W in TOWNSGATE renders like an H ('TOHNSGATE'); slightly heavy
original 'WESTLAKE VILLAGE, CA 91361' city/state/zip line is missing between address and phone
trailing unit 'lb' renders as '1b' (one-b) at end of weight line
missing trailing 'F' tax flag its sibling items carry; '2.75' rendered in larger/bolder font than the 4.29/3.23 amounts above
'0.50' amount oversized/bold vs the price column; pricing font weight inconsistent
malformed weight line: leading stray '/', no '@', and 'lb' garbled to '1b' twice; tan color differs from neighbors
stray orphan unit '1b' on its own line under GARLIC-BULK; weight/price portion of the line is missing
amount '41.82' is tiny and shoved to the extreme right margin, not aligned with the item price column
'$41.82' tiny and pushed to far-right edge, misaligned vs price column and vs BALANCE DUE above

lines.text: Save up to $25 more a month!

worst_lines: line 33: malformed weight line, leading stray '/', no '@', 'lb' garbled to '1b' twice
line 45/46: BALANCE DUE / CREDIT CARD amounts tiny and shoved to far-right margin, off the price column
line 3: original WESTLAKE VILLAGE, CA 91361 address line is missing
line 39: orphan '1b' unit on its own line under GARLIC-BULK
line 29: ONION-WHITE missing 'F' tax flag and amount oversized vs neighbors

thermal.hybrid_issues: too crisp and uniformly clean vs the original's thermal noise; colors (green/red/blue) over-saturated; amounts inconsistently sized; weight-line units garble 'lb'->'1b'; price column breaks down at BALANCE DUE/CREDIT CARD
thermal.glyph_issues: no glyph atlas panel was rendered for this receipt (only ORIGINAL + synthetic hybrid present)
thermal.vs_original: both lack the subtle paper texture, slight skew, edge fade and ink-density variation of a real thermal print; the hybrid is uniformly sharp where the real receipt has soft, slightly blurred thermal edges and consistent monospace column alignment

summary: The hybrid render is legible and structurally close to a real Gelson's receipt but is given away by garbled/orphaned weight-unit lines ('lb'->'1b'), a missing city address line, inconsistent amount font sizing, a missing tax flag, and BALANCE DUE/CREDIT CARD amounts shoved tiny to the far-right margin off the price column.
